name: libdata-optlist-perl
title: libdata-optlist-perl
summary: module to parse and validate simple name/value option pairs
description:
module to parse and validate simple name/value option pairs
Data::OptList is a Perl module useful for working with simple name-and-value
option pairs. It assumes any defined scalar is a name and any reference after
it is its value.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-optlist-perl because module to parse and validate simple name/value option pairs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-optlist-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-optlist-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-optlist-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
